testcase.name: TC06_IncorrectLocation5

failure.message: Element <a class="dropdown-toggle dropdown-btn travellers waves-effect" href="#"> is not clickable at point (996,467) because another element <li class="select2-results__option select2-results__message"> obscures it Build info: version: '4.29.0', revision: '5fc1ec94cb' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [4b6cc1aa-2554-43a1-b2a9-446e0cdabe97, clickElement {id=5e1b492d-fcfe-45f8-9b42-d5664199488b}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 135.0.1, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20250216192613, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.36.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 4708, moz:profile: C:\Users\tient\AppData\Loca..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Element: [[FirefoxDriver: firefox on windows (4b6cc1aa-2554-43a1-b2a9-446e0cdabe97)] -> xpath: /html/body/main/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div/div/div/div/div[4]/form/div/div[5]/div/div/div/a] Session ID: 4b6cc1aa-2554-43a1-b2a9-446e0cdabe97

testcase.name: TC07_PickUpTimeBlank
